camps.name: Pune Municipal Relief Camp
camps.description: Urban relief camp with medical support, clean water, and 500-person capacity for flood evacuees.

camps.name: Hinjewadi Community Shelter
camps.description: Community shelter operated by local NGO; suitable for short-term evacuation of 200 people with sanitation and first aid.

camps.name: Mumbai Coastal Cyclone Shelter
camps.description: Purpose-built cyclone shelter close to coastal wards; reinforced building with food stock and medical kit for 800 persons.

camps.name: Thane District Refugee Camp
camps.description: Rural relief camp hosting displaced families from landslide-prone villages; provides food, water, and community kitchen.

camps.name: Raigad Evacuation Centre
camps.description: District evacuation centre in government school premises, equipped for monsoon flooding and cyclone evacuation.

camps.name: Nashik Relief Base
camps.description: Relief camp with medical team, mobile water tankers, and registration desk for displaced families from Nashik and surrounding talukas.

camps.name: Kolhapur Flood Relief Camp
camps.description: Seasonal flood relief camp in school premises; handles Panchganga basin displacements with food kitchen and medical support.

camps.name: Nagpur Emergency Shelter
camps.description: Urban emergency shelter serving heatwave and flash-flood evacuees with cooling centre and ORS distribution.

camps.name: Solapur Drought Relief Camp
camps.description: Long-term relief camp for drought-affected farmers; water tanker supply, fodder, and medical screening.

camps.name: Ratnagiri Coastal Shelter
camps.description: Konkan coast cyclone shelter; handles Arabian Sea cyclone evacuations with backup generator and food for 3 days.
